scripts.desktop:dev:raw: bun run tailwind:build && CLAWOS_DESKTOP_DEV=1 bun run electrobun:dev:watch
scripts.desktop:build: bun run tailwind:build && bun run electrobun:build
scripts.desktop:build:dev: bun run tailwind:build && bun run scripts/electrobun.ts build --env=dev
scripts.desktop:build:setup: bun run tailwind:build && bun run scripts/electrobun.ts build --env=stable
scripts.desktop:build:canary: bun run tailwind:build && bun run scripts/electrobun.ts build --env=canary
scripts.desktop:build:stable: bun run tailwind:build && bun run scripts/electrobun.ts build --env=stable
scripts.start: bun run tailwind:build && bun run electrobun:dev
